description.value: Price 28,312 gp; Slot none; CL 9th; Weight 5 lbs.; Aura moderate necromancy DESCRIPTION Marrowcracker is a +2 mighty cleaving warhammer with a haft carved to look like a stout femur. Whenever the wielder confirms a critical hit against a corporeal creature with a skeletal system, the creature struck takes 1d4 points of Strength or Dexterity damage (wielder’s choice). CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 14,312 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells calcific touch, divine power, ray of enfeeblement
